description: Perform an authenticated crawl of http://quotes.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Configure 'Forms Based' authentication for http://quotes.toscrape.com/login using username 'admin' and password 'password'. Export the 'Internal > HTML' data to a CSV file in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ and create a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/auth_success_report.txt documenting the presence of the authenticated-only '/logout/' URL in the crawl results.
